name: NEON JUMPER
description: Try Neon Jumper now, an adrenaline-fueled game where you guide a small green square through glowing circuits and electrified pathways! The entire world features a futuristic neon glow aesthetic that keeps the energy high and your reflexes sharp. The gameplay is simple and addictive: tap the screen to jump, tap again to double jump. It’s endless — your mission is to survive as long as possible and set a new world record! Blast through the action with intense speed metal tracks powering every run. Don’t forget to collect all coins and power-ups to boost your performance. Jump in and enjoy the neon rush!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
tags: free html5 games for your website
